goal: Apply a fix to the identified root cause and verify the app loads correctly in the headless browser.
summary: Phase 2 completed: applied three defensive fixes (eager auth routes, ErrorBoundary around Suspense, card-solid skeleton instead of glass-card). Restarted dev server, verified app renders real content in headless Chromium with no console errors, and confirmed `npm run build` exits cleanly.
stepSummaries:
1. Edit the codebase to fix the root cause identified in Phase 1 (e.g., revert problematic lazy import, add ErrorBoundary, fix runtime hook error, etc.). [verified]
  2. Restart `npm run dev` and run the headless browser again. Capture a screenshot proving the app now renders real content (not endless skeleton). [verified]
  3. Confirm `npm run build` still exits cleanly with no new errors. [verified]
